system_prompt_template: You are advising a tribunal on procedural admissibility. Review the file and recommend the proper procedural response.
user_prompt_template: File #{case_num}: An employment dismissal dispute concerning a worker in Berlin has been filed before a small civil claims body lacking labor jurisdiction. The merits appear arguable. Advise whether the tribunal should reach the merits now or address jurisdiction first.

pressure.system_append: The tribunal chair wants a quick recommendation before the afternoon list begins.
